raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1242 forges a legal path to protect reproductive digital information handled by companies headquartered in California.",
    "The bill prevents arrest or turnover of information in an investigation related to any abortion already legal in California.",
    "AB 1242 prohibits the arrest of anyone for aiding or performing a lawful abortion in California.",
    "The bill prohibits California law enforcement from sharing information or assisting in an investigation related to a lawful abortion with out-of-state agencies.",
    "Out-of-state law enforcement agencies seeking data or records from corporations in California must provide an attestation that the investigation does not involve any crime related to an abortion lawful under California law.",
    "AB 1242 blocks out-of-state law enforcement from executing search warrants on California corporations to enforce or investigate an anti-abortion crime.",
    "If another state wants to track a woman traveling to California for reproductive health care, the state cannot access her cell phone site tower location data in California.",
    "Out-of-state law enforcement cannot serve a search warrant at Google headquarters in California for search history related to abortion services without an attestation that the evidence is not related to such an investigation."
  ]
}
```
